name: SK Hynix
role: ~62% HBM share Q2 2025; anchor supplier to NVDA/OpenAI; 2026 capacity pre-booked.

name: Samsung Electronics
role: NVDA-qualified on 12-Hi HBM3E; first to claim HBM4 mass production (Feb 2026).

name: Micron Technology
role: 15–20% HBM share; HBM sold out through CY26; power-per-watt leader.

name: Taiwan Semiconductor
role: Effective monopoly on N3/N2 for AI silicon; controls CoWoS-S/L packaging.

name: Intel
role: 18A risk-on; foundry remains a show-me. EMIB/Foveros qualifying with hyperscalers.

name: GlobalFoundries
role: Mature-node foundry; not on AI leading edge but structural beneficiary of trailing-node demand.

name: ASE Technology
role: Top OSAT; ramping CoWoP and FOPLP for CoWoS spillover.

name: Amkor Technology
role: US packaging buildout (Arizona); secondary CoWoS-class capacity.

name: King Yuan Electronics (KYEC)
role: Testing bottleneck partner for AI packaging.

name: ASML
role: EUV monopoly; 2026 guide €36–40B; €38.8B backlog. High-NA at SKH and Samsung.

name: Applied Materials
role: Deposition/etch breadth; HBM TSV exposure.

name: Lam Research
role: Etch + memory tooling; direct HBM levered. Underappreciated for HBM TSV ramp.

name: KLA Corporation
role: Process control; irreplaceable at 2nm.

name: Tokyo Electron
role: Etch/coat; strong HBM exposure.

name: NVIDIA
role: ~85%+ of merchant AI training silicon. Blackwell sold out mid-2026.

name: Advanced Micro Devices
role: MI300/MI350 ramping at OpenAI, Meta inference.

name: Broadcom
role: Custom-AI ASIC kingmaker (Google TPU, Meta MTIA); ~70% custom-AI share.

name: Marvell Technology
role: Trainium (AWS), Maia (MSFT), Meta DPU; underappreciated on ASIC mix shift.

name: Alphabet (TPU)
role: TPU is the only fully integrated hyperscaler stack (TPU + DeepMind + YT ads).

name: Lumentum
role: Only volume supplier of 200G/lane EMLs (the 1.6T enabler). Demand 25–30% above supply.

name: Coherent
role: InP lasers sold out through 2027; 4x book-to-bill in DC.

name: Fabrinet
role: Contract optical manufacturer; first $1B quarter; +36% YoY.

name: InnoLight Technology
role: ~50%+ of NVDA's 800G transceiver modules.

name: Eoptolink
role: 33% net margins, +179% revenue. High-quality optics business.

name: MaxLinear
role: Optical DSPs.

name: Arista Networks
role: Took DC switch crown from Cisco. 2026 guide ~+20%; AI/campus growth ~60%.

name: Cisco Systems
role: Raised AI infra revenue to $3B; HPE/Juniper combined now competitive.

name: Hewlett Packard Enterprise
role: Post-Juniper, full networking suite.

name: Celestica
role: White-box ODM gaining hyperscaler networking share. Sleeper.

name: Accton Technology
role: Taiwan white-box ODM; hyperscaler switch supplier.

name: GE Vernova
role: Transformers + gas turbines; backlog $163B; 2026 DC orders $2.4B already exceed all 2025.

name: Eaton
role: Switchgear, distribution, PDUs. DC orders +30%+ for 4 quarters.

name: Vertiv
role: Power + cooling integrated; $15B backlog (+109% YoY); NVDA partner.

name: Generac
role: Gensets, 50–60 wk lead time vs. 70–107 wk for Cat/Cummins. Stargate slot.

name: Hubbell
role: Utility T&D — every grid-buildout dollar.

name: Quanta Services
role: Substation/transmission EPC.

name: Constellation Energy
role: Largest US nuclear operator; MSFT PPA to restart Three Mile Island Unit 1 for AI baseload.

name: Oklo Inc.
role: SMR developer (Aurora powerhouse); Sam Altman-backed; pure-play on AI-driven SMR demand.

name: Centrus Energy
role: Sole US producer of HALEU; fuel bottleneck for advanced reactors and SMRs.

name: nVent Electric
role: ~30% DC exposure, growing NVDA depth.

name: Modine Manufacturing
role: DC sales +31% sequential Q3 FY26; mgmt guides 50–70% DC growth.

name: Schneider Electric
role: Broadest DC power+cooling portfolio.

name: Asia Vital Components (AVC)
role: Taiwan thermal leader; liquid cooling + vapor chambers for AI servers; key supplier into NVDA OEMs.

name: Jentech Precision Industrial
role: Heat-spreader / vapor-chamber specialist for AI-server thermal solutions.

name: Auras Technology
role: Liquid cooling / cold-plate supplier on TPEx; pure-play AI thermal beneficiary.

name: Microsoft
role: CY26 capex $190B; CFO attributed $25B of increase to memory/component costs.

name: Meta Platforms
role: FY26 raised $10B to >$145B; –90% FCF projected.

name: Amazon
role: ~$200B FY26 capex; –$17B projected FCF.

name: Oracle

role: 2026E +206% rev; EV ~½ of CRWV.
